name: XML External Entity (XXE) Processing
description: DocumentBuilderFactory.newInstance() is used without disabling external entity processing. An attacker who controls XML input can read local files, perform SSRF, or cause denial of service via entity expansion.
remediation: Disable DTDs and external entities by calling setFeature() on the factory: set http://apache.org/xml/features/disallow-doctype-decl to true, or set http://xml.org/sax/features/external-general-entities and http://xml.org/sax/features/external-parameter-entities to false.
